sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109351" key="u(potetra/gwnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποτετράγωνος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n109351.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">almost square</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rectangular,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Adam.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.23</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
